page.index.title: TournaQ – Scoring, Games and Tournament Management
index.hero.title: Overview
index.hero.subtitle: Built for Beach Volleyball today. Designed for Tournaments tomorrow.
index.about.title: About TournaQ
index.about.text: TournaQ is developed as a focused sports management tool for beach volleyball. The current release supports scoring, while the long-term goal is to simplify the entire tournament workflow.
index.features.title: Available Today
index.features.text: TournaQ currently focuses on practical beach volleyball scoring and match organization.
index.card.scoring.title: Match Scoring
index.card.scoring.text: Keep track of beach volleyball scores in a simple and focused interface.
index.card.teams.title: Teams & Games
index.card.teams.text: Support for organizing teams and games as the foundation for future tournament tools.
index.card.multilingual.title: Multilingual App
index.card.multilingual.text: Designed with international use in mind, including English, German and Spanish.

index.roadmap.text: The vision is to evolve from scoring into a complete tournament management platform.

page.product.title: Product Overview – TournaQ
product.hero.title: TournaQ Detail
product.hero.subtitle: Beach Volleyball Scoring Today. Tournament Management Tomorrow.
product.overview.title: Product Overview
product.overview.p1: TournaQ is a beach volleyball scoring application designed to make match management simple, fast, and reliable.
product.overview.p2: The current release focuses on what matters most during live competition: accurate scoring, intuitive match management, and a user experience that works reliably on mobile devices, even without an internet connection.
product.overview.p3: TournaQ was created from the practical needs of beach volleyball players, referees, and tournament organizers who require a simple and dependable scoring solution during real events.
product.overview.p4: While scoring is the current focus, TournaQ is being developed with a broader vision: evolving into a complete platform for tournament and competition management.
product.today.title: What TournaQ Does Today
product.today.text: The current version of TournaQ focuses on live match scoring.
product.scoring.title: Scoring
product.matchmgmt.title: Match Management
product.today.optimized: The application is optimized for quick and reliable use during live matches.
product.why.title: Why Beach Volleyball?
product.why.intro: Beach volleyball presents unique challenges for tournament organizers and scorekeepers:
product.why.text: TournaQ was designed specifically with these requirements in mind. By focusing on beach volleyball first, the platform can provide a more refined and practical experience before expanding into broader tournament functionality.
product.vision.title: The Vision
product.vision.text: TournaQ is not intended to remain only a scoring application. The long-term vision is to create a platform that supports the entire competition lifecycle.
product.lifecycle.title: Competition Lifecycle
product.compdata.title: Competition Data
product.vision.summary: The goal is to bring all tournament-related information into a single, easy-to-use platform.
product.direction.title: Product Direction
product.direction.today.title: Today
product.direction.today.text: TournaQ provides a fast and reliable beach volleyball scoring experience.
product.direction.next.title: Next
product.direction.next.text: Future development will expand tournament functionality.
product.direction.longterm.title: Long-Term
product.direction.longterm.text: A complete tournament management platform from planning through final results.
product.principles.title: Core Principles
product.principles.simplicity.title: Simplicity
product.principles.simplicity.text: Tournament tools should be intuitive and easy to use.
product.principles.reliability.title: Reliability
product.principles.reliability.text: Competition management tools must work consistently when needed most.
product.principles.offline.title: Offline First
product.principles.offline.text: Essential functionality should remain available regardless of internet connectivity.
product.principles.practicality.title: Practicality
product.principles.practicality.text: Features should solve real problems faced by organizers, referees, and players.
product.principles.improvement.title: Continuous Improvement
product.principles.improvement.text: TournaQ is being developed step by step, with each release building toward a broader tournament management ecosystem.
product.who.title: Who Is TournaQ For?
product.who.li6: Recreational and Competitive Beach Volleyball Communities
product.who.text: As the platform evolves, support for additional competition management workflows will continue to expand.
page.guide.title: TournaQ – User Guide
guide.hero.title: User Guide
guide.hero.subtitle: Beach Volleyball Scoring with TournaQ.
guide.nav.title: Quick Navigation
guide.overview.title: Overview
guide.overview.text: TournaQ is a beach volleyball scoring app designed for quick match setup, live scoring, match history and future tournament management.
guide.areas.title: Main App Areas
guide.areas.home.title: Home Screen
guide.areas.home.text: The Home screen is the main entry point. Access Quick Start Game, Match History and upcoming tournament features from here.
guide.areas.drawer.title: Navigation Drawer
guide.areas.drawer.text: The navigation drawer opens from the menu icon and provides access to Home, Quick Start Game, Sponsoring & Promo, Contact & About and Settings.
guide.areas.games.title: Games & Match History
guide.areas.games.text: The Games screen shows in-progress and completed matches with team names, set scores, match status and the winner when the match is completed.
guide.quickstart.title: Quick Start Game
guide.quickstart.text: Quick Start Game allows users to create a beach volleyball match quickly without complex setup.
guide.quickstart.format.title: Select Match Format
guide.quickstart.format.text: Choose One Set or Best of Three Sets as the match format.
guide.quickstart.teams.title: Choose Teams
guide.quickstart.teams.text: Select existing teams, create new teams manually, or let the app generate random teams.
guide.quickstart.random.title: Random Team Generator
guide.quickstart.random.text: Generate fun random team names, re-roll if needed and start the match.
guide.scoreboard.title: Scoreboard
guide.scoreboard.text: The Scoreboard is the main live scoring screen. It displays team names, scores, sets, player names, active player information and match actions.
guide.scoreboard.vertical.title: Vertical Scoreboard
guide.scoreboard.vertical.text: The vertical scoreboard provides a complete view for live scoring, including all information needed during a match.
guide.scoreboard.landscape.title: Landscape Scoreboard
guide.scoreboard.landscape.text: The landscape scoreboard is optimized for horizontal mobile use during live matches.
guide.scoreboard.options.title: Match History
guide.scoreboard.options.text: The Match History view shows a point-by-point log of the match, including who scored each point and when sides switched.
guide.controls.title: Match Controls
guide.controls.text: Match controls help you manage side changes, team positions and service order during live scoring.
guide.controls.sidechange.title: Side Change Reminder
guide.controls.sidechange.text: When the total score reaches the target, a dialog prompts teams to switch sides. Confirm to continue the match.
guide.controls.swap.title: After Side Change
guide.controls.swap.text: After confirming a side change, the teams are automatically swapped on the scoreboard so the display always reflects the physical court position.
guide.controls.service.title: Change Service
guide.controls.service.text: The active server is highlighted on the scoreboard. Service changes automatically when the non-serving team scores, and can also be adjusted manually.
guide.players.title: Editing Players
guide.players.edit.title: Player Names & Service
guide.players.edit.text: Player names are shown directly on the scoreboard. The highlighted chip indicates the active server for that team.
guide.players.mgmt.title: Player Management
guide.players.mgmt.text: Future versions may expand player administration as part of broader tournament management.
guide.players.team.title: Team Management
guide.players.team.text: Team management will continue to evolve as TournaQ grows beyond scoring.
guide.workflow.title: Common Match Workflow
guide.workflow.li3: Select One Set or Best of Three Sets.
guide.workflow.li4: Choose existing teams, create new teams or generate random teams.
guide.workflow.li6: Use the plus and minus buttons to score.
guide.workflow.li10: Return to Games to review match history.
guide.future.title: Future Tournament Management
guide.future.setup.title: Tournament Setup
guide.future.setup.text: Future development will expand TournaQ toward tournament setup and administration.
guide.future.standings.title: Standings
guide.future.standings.text: Planned tournament functionality may include standings and competition progress tracking.
guide.future.brackets.title: Brackets
guide.future.brackets.text: Bracket management is part of the long-term direction toward full tournament management.

page.contact.title: Contact & Feedback – TournaQ
contact.hero.title: Contact & Feedback
contact.hero.subtitle: Help shape the future of TournaQ.
contact.feedback.title: Share Feedback
contact.feedback.p1: TournaQ is actively under development. Feedback from organizers, clubs, officials, referees, coaches, and players plays an important role in shaping future releases.
contact.feedback.p2: We welcome suggestions, feature requests, bug reports, and general feedback from the beach volleyball community.
contact.inquiries.title: Business, Legal or Privacy Inquiries
contact.inquiries.text: For legal, privacy, business, or support-related inquiries, you can contact TournaQ by email.
contact.instagram.title: Instagram
contact.instagram.text: Follow TournaQ for updates, product news and future releases.
contact.thanks.title: Thank You
contact.thanks.text: Thank you for supporting TournaQ and being part of its journey from beach volleyball scoring toward complete tournament management.

privacy.page.title: Privacy Policy – TournaQ
privacy.header.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: TournaQ is a local-first app — your game data stays on your device. We do not operate user accounts, and no app data is transmitted to our servers. This policy explains how we handle the limited information that is processed when you use the app.
privacy.controller.title: Data Controller
privacy.controller.p: The data controller responsible for this app is:
privacy.collect.title: Data We Collect and Process
privacy.collect.local.label: App data (local storage only):
privacy.collect.li2: Team and player names you enter
privacy.collect.highlight: This data is stored exclusively on your device using local on-device storage (Hive). It is never transmitted to us or any third party. We do not have access to this locally stored data.
privacy.collect.ads.label: Advertising data (via Google AdMob):
privacy.collect.ads.text: TournaQ displays non-personalized advertisements through Google AdMob. Google may process certain technical and device-related information required for ad delivery and fraud prevention in accordance with Google's own privacy policies. We configure AdMob to serve non-personalized ads by default.
privacy.legal.title: Legal Basis for Processing (GDPR)
privacy.legal.li1: Consent (Article 6(1)(a)): For advertising-related data processing by Google AdMob, where consent is requested via the in-app UMP consent dialog.
privacy.legal.li2: Legitimate interest (Article 6(1)(f)): For the local storage of app data necessary to provide core app functionality (score tracking, tournament management).
privacy.legal.withdrawal: You may withdraw your advertising consent at any time via Contact & About → Privacy Options in the app.
privacy.third.title: Third-Party Services
privacy.third.text: We use Google AdMob to display non-personalized advertisements. Google acts as an independent data controller for data it processes. Google LLC participates in the EU–US Data Privacy Framework.
privacy.third.li2: How Google uses data from apps
privacy.third.other: No other third-party services are used. External links in the app (e.g. Instagram, feedback form) lead to services with their own independent privacy policies.
privacy.transfer.title: International Data Transfers
privacy.transfer.p1: The app data you enter is stored locally on your device and never transferred internationally by us.
privacy.transfer.p2: Google AdMob may transfer advertising-related data to servers in the United States. Google LLC is certified under the EU–US Data Privacy Framework, which provides an adequate level of data protection as recognised by the European Commission.
privacy.retention.title: Data Retention
privacy.retention.li1: Local app data: Retained on your device until you delete it via app settings or uninstall the app. We have no control over or access to this data.
privacy.retention.li2: Advertising data: Retained by Google according to Google's retention policies.
privacy.rights.title: Your Rights Under GDPR
privacy.rights.intro: As a data subject in the European Economic Area, you have the following rights:
privacy.rights.access: Right of Access Request a copy of your personal data (Art. 15)
privacy.rights.erasure: Right to Erasure Request deletion of your data (Art. 17)
privacy.rights.restriction: Right to Restriction Limit how your data is used (Art. 18)
privacy.rights.portability: Right to Portability Receive your data in a portable format (Art. 20)
privacy.rights.object: Right to Object Object to processing based on legitimate interest (Art. 21)
privacy.rights.exercise.p1: For local app data, you can exercise most of these rights directly by deleting data within the app or uninstalling it. For advertising data processed by Google, contact Google directly or adjust your device's advertising settings.
privacy.rights.exercise.p2: To exercise your rights regarding any data we control, contact us at team@tournaq.com.
privacy.complaint.title: Right to Lodge a Complaint
privacy.complaint.p1: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority. You may do so in the EU member state of your habitual residence, place of work, or where the alleged infringement occurred.
privacy.complaint.p2: A list of EU supervisory authorities is available at: edpb.europa.eu
privacy.children.title: Children's Privacy
privacy.children.text: TournaQ is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has been affected, please contact us at team@tournaq.com.
privacy.changes.title: Changes to This Policy
privacy.changes.text: We may update this Privacy Policy as the app evolves. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page will reflect any changes. Your continued use of TournaQ after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.contact.title: Contact
privacy.contact.text: For any privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights, please contact us at:
terms.page.title: Terms of Use – TournaQ
terms.header.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Use carefully before using TournaQ. By downloading or using the app, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.
terms.acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
terms.acceptance.p1: By accessing or using TournaQ ("the App"), you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy. These terms apply to all users of the App.
terms.acceptance.p2: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of the App after changes are published constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
terms.about.title: 2. About the App
terms.about.p1: TournaQ is a scoring, games, and tournament management application developed by Martin Adam. The App is designed to help users track game scores, manage teams, and organise sports tournaments — primarily on mobile devices (iOS and Android).
terms.about.p2: The App operates locally on your device. No user account is required, and no app data is transmitted to external servers.
terms.license.title: 3. License to Use
terms.license.p1: Subject to these Terms, we grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable licence to use the App for personal, non-commercial purposes on a device you own or control.
terms.license.intro: This licence does not include the right to:
terms.license.li1: Sublicence, sell, resell, or transfer the App or any part of it
terms.license.li2: Modify, adapt, or create derivative works
terms.license.li3: Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the App
terms.license.li4: Remove or alter any proprietary notices or labels
terms.data.title: 4. Your Data and Content
terms.data.p1: All game data, match scores, team names, and player information you enter into TournaQ is stored locally on your device. You retain full ownership of this data.
terms.data.p2: We do not access, collect, transmit, or use any content you create within the App. You are solely responsible for the accuracy of the information you enter and for keeping your device secure.
terms.data.p3: Deleting the App or clearing its data will permanently remove all locally stored information. We cannot recover this data on your behalf.
terms.prohibited.title: 5. Prohibited Uses
terms.prohibited.intro: You agree not to use the App to:
terms.prohibited.li1: Violate any applicable laws, regulations, or third-party rights
terms.prohibited.li2: Attempt to gain unauthorised access to any systems related to the App
terms.prohibited.li3: Interfere with or disrupt the App's functionality
terms.prohibited.li4: Use the App for any commercial purpose without our prior written consent
terms.prohibited.li5: Distribute, reproduce, or exploit the App's content without permission
terms.advertising.title: 6. Advertising
terms.advertising.p1: The App may display non-personalized advertisements through Google AdMob; you may manage your privacy preferences via Contact & About → Privacy Options within the App.
terms.advertising.p2: We are not responsible for the content of third-party advertisements. Google AdMob's use of data is governed by Google's Privacy Policy.
terms.ip.title: 7. Intellectual Property
terms.ip.p1: All rights, title, and interest in and to the App — including its design, graphics, name "TournaQ", logo, and source code — are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. Nothing in these Terms transfers any intellectual property rights to you.
terms.ip.p2: You may not use the TournaQ name, logo, or any other branding elements without prior written permission.
terms.warranty.title: 8. Disclaimer of Warranties
terms.warranty.p1: The App is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.
terms.warranty.p2: We do not warrant that the App will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of viruses or other harmful components. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the App at any time without notice.
terms.warranty.warning: Always maintain your own records for important match or tournament data. We cannot be held responsible for data loss due to device failure, app updates, or accidental deletion.
terms.liability.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
terms.liability.p1: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable EU law, Martin Adam shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or in connection with your use of the App, including but not limited to loss of data, loss of profits, or loss of goodwill.
terms.liability.p2: Our total aggregate liability for any claims under these Terms shall not exceed the amount you paid for the App (if any).
terms.liability.p3: Nothing in these Terms limits liability for death or personal injury caused by negligence, or for any other liability that cannot be excluded or limited under applicable EU consumer law.
terms.links.title: 10. Third-Party Links
terms.links.text: The App may contain links to external websites or services (e.g. Instagram, Google Feedback Forms). These links are provided for convenience only. We have no control over external sites and accept no responsibility for their content, privacy practices, or terms.
terms.law.title: 11. Governing Law
terms.law.p1: These Terms of Use are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the European Union applicable to the developer's jurisdiction, without regard to conflict of law principles.
terms.law.p2: Any disputes arising under these Terms shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the competent courts, without prejudice to your rights as a consumer under applicable EU consumer protection laws, including the right to use the EU Online Dispute Resolution platform at ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.
terms.contact.title: 12. Contact
terms.contact.text: For questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us at:

guide.completion.title: Set & Game Completion
guide.completion.set.title: Set Complete
guide.completion.set.text: When a team reaches the target score the set is completed. The result is locked and you can proceed to the next set or complete the game.
guide.completion.game.title: Game Complete
guide.completion.game.text: When the match is decided the game completion screen shows all set results and the winner. The match is saved to Match History.
index.problem.title: Tournament Management Still Runs on Paper
index.problem.intro: Running a beach volleyball tournament still largely happens on paper. Score sheets have to be prepared beforehand, distributed to each court, collected after every match, and manually tallied — a slow, error-prone process that TournaQ already replaces with live digital scoring.
index.problem.li1: Court changes and late cancellations are difficult to communicate on the fly
index.problem.li2: Injuries and team withdrawals require unplanned bracket adjustments
index.problem.li3: Standings, seeding, and double-elimination systems demand complex manual calculations
index.problem.li4: League phases and scramble formats add significant organisational overhead
index.problem.li5: Last-minute scrambles leave organizers and players in the dark
index.problem.text: There is no widely adopted digital platform built specifically for beach volleyball. TournaQ is being built to change that — starting with scoring and growing into a complete tournament management solution.
index.vision.title: Where We're Headed
